name: GitHub MCP
description: Official GitHub MCP server. Gives AI agents read/write access to repositories, issues, pull requests, code search, and GitHub Actions via Model Context Protocol.

skills.name: Repository Ops
skills.description: Create, clone, search, and manage GitHub repositories including branch and commit operations

skills.name: Issue Management
skills.description: Create, update, label, assign, and close GitHub issues with full metadata control

skills.name: PR Review
skills.description: Open pull requests, add review comments, request changes, and merge via MCP tools

skills.name: Code Search
skills.description: Search across GitHub repositories with keyword, language, and path filters

skills.name: Actions Trigger
skills.description: Trigger GitHub Actions workflows and retrieve run logs from an AI agent
